tasks.prompt:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: cover.
Image grammar: hook_cover.
Purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..
Diagram type: workflow_map.
Concept summary: 你的系统跑在经过认证的硬件上，每一个接口变更都要走合规流程，供应商名单三年才能更新一次。这不是保守主义，是行业现实。而 AI 厂商的发布节奏以周计算，这两个时钟根本不在同一个频率上。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Editorial-infographic style with hand-drawn organic lines, warm palette, conceptual composition. Not a screenshot, not a diagram — an editorial visual..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure, one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area, icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots, clean title zone with breathing room, 3-4 clear stages with directional connectors, start/end anchors that are visually obvious.
Key relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance, make the core judgment visible within one glance, show one tension and one payoff only.
Layout pattern: linear_progression_cover.
Diagram focus: sequential operating logic with explicit stage handoff.
Text position: right.
Text budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 4 labels.
On-canvas headline: "Cohere 与 Saab".
On-canvas subheadline: "你的系统跑在经过认证的硬件上".
Grammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only, Background: warm off-white (#faf8f5)., Primary accent: warm coral (#e8734a)., Secondary accent: teal (#4a9e8e)., Linework: charcoal (#3a3a3a)., prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering, preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects, do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics, avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation.
Additional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Editorial-infographic: cream base, coral accent, teal structure. Hand-drawn with controlled imperfection. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy. Style profil….
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: workflow_map.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: workflow_map.
Concept summary: ---.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Editorial-infographic style with hand-drawn organic lines, warm palette, conceptual composition. Not a screenshot, not a diagram — an editorial visual..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: 3-4 step modules, arrows, artifact or action icons, numbered step modules with directional arrows, one icon per stage for quick recognition.
Key relationships to visualize: show how the system operates, make stage handoff obvious, show sequence and dependencies explicitly.
Layout pattern: linear_progression.
Diagram focus: step-by-step process handoff.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 3 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 4 labels.
On-canvas headline: "你的系统跑在经过认证的…".
Grammar rules: Show 3-4 stages max. This is a process graphic, not an article summary. Each stage must be visually distinct.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.
Additional direction: Use the workflow_map grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 你的系统跑在经过认证的硬件上，每一个接口变更都要走合规… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: process-flow (flowchart + notion). Apply process-flow preset: flowchart logic with Notion-style clean spacing..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: example_comparison.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: stage_evolution.
Concept summary: Saab 不是一家普通的企业客户。其运营系统横跨飞行控制、任务规划、态势感知和后勤支援，每个环节都有严格的合规要求和认证边界。对这类客户而言，AI 整合的障碍从来不是"技术上能不能做到"，而是：.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Editorial-infographic style with hand-drawn organic lines, warm palette, conceptual composition. Not a screenshot, not a diagram — an editorial visual..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: left card vs right card, center arrow, one bottom takeaway, few text blocks, two-column contrast with one takeaway strip, evidence markers aligned by criterion.
Key relationships to visualize: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious, show why one example proves the point.
Layout pattern: comparison_matrix.
Diagram focus: before/after evidence contrast.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 4 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 10 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 6 labels.
On-canvas headline: "：".
On-canvas subheadline: "不是一家普通的企业…".
Use short Chinese labels only: **谁来承担认…, **数据主权与…, **供应商连续…, **定制深度*….
Grammar rules: Use a left-vs-right or before-vs-after structure. One example should prove the section point immediately. Avoid extra supporting text blocks.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.
Additional direction: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这份 MOU 解决的核心摩擦是什么 Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Concept summary: **现在值得认真跟进的场景**，是那些同时满足以下两个条件的团队：其一，正在评估将 AI 引入任务规划、异常检测或运营调度等受约束工作流；其二，已经在和 Cohere 或类似私有部署模型的厂商做技术预研。Saab 与 Cohere 的合作框架，意味着这类谈判在国防和航空航天行业….
